goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit artifact builder for release governance audit receipt record audit authorities without merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, durable audit writes, approved action consumption, or external release actions.
scope_out: Do not merge, open PRs, call GitHub, write audits, perform durable persistence, consume approved actions, perform external actions, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Release governance audit receipt record audit authority artifacts can produce an in-memory audit artifact.
Audited-at ref and audit evidence ref are required.
Merge, PR creation, GitHub calls, audit writes, external release actions, action consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing audit evidence ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Durable audit write, durable persistence, approved action consumption, merge, PR creation, GitHub call, external release action, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-202 authorized release governance audit receipt record audit artifacts without recording them.
